disclaimer.name: Digestive Bliss
disclaimer.description: A delightful blend of meadowsweet, aniseed, ginger root, and peppermint, thoughtfully crafted to support digestive comfort. This soothing infusion is designed to be a refreshing choice for those seeking gently stomach support and overall digestive well-being.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: Botanic Glow
disclaimer.description: A revitalising blend of nettle, spearmint, linseed, and echinacea, thoughtfully crafted to support immune health and promote skin vitality. With nurturing, adaptogenic properties, this refreshing infusion is designed to be a delightful addition to your daily routine, promoting overall wellness from within.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: African Chai
disclaimer.description: An aromatic blend of roobios, cardamom, honeybush, cinnamon, star anise, ginger, fennel, clove, and peppercorn, thoughtfully crafted to create a warming and inviting experience. This infusion combines the rich essence of roobios with ingredients often chosen for digestive enjoyment, making it a perfect choice for any time of day.

products.name: Golden Turmeric Blend
products.imageAlt: Jar and spoon of golden turmeric blend

products.name: Calming Chamomile Tea
products.imageAlt: Cup of chamomile tea with flowers

disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: Winter Wellness
disclaimer.description: A comforting blend of ginger root, lemon balm, yarrow, echinacea, thoughtfully crafted to offer gentle throat-soothing qualities and warmth. This soothing infusion is designed for comfort during colder months, making it an ideal companion for your seasonal wellness routine.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: Apple Delight
disclaimer.description: Savour the taste of summer with this refreshing blend of dried apple pieces, rosehip, lemongrass, and spearmint. This naturally sweet, fruity tea can be enjoyed hot or cold, offering a revitalising experience in each sip. With the brightness of lemongrass and the calming touch of spearmint, it's a delightful escape any time of the year.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: Summer Breeze
disclaimer.description: A vibrant pink blend of hibiscus, peppermint, and lemon balm, this tea is perfect for warm days and can be enjoyed hot or cold. Hibiscus brings refreshing qualities, while peppermint and lemon balm and gentle, soothing notes to each sip. Unlike warming spices, this blend's naturally cooling character creates a rejuvenating and enjoyable experience.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: Lemongrass and Ginger
disclaimer.description: A delightful blend of meadowsweet, aniseed, ginger root, and peppermint, thoughtfully crafted to support digestive comfort. This soothing infusion is designed to be a refreshing choice for those seeking gently stomach support and overall digestive well-being.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: Ceylon Chai
disclaimer.description: Enjoy the vibrant warmth of our Ceylon Chai, a delightful fusion of rich Ceylon Black Tea, and aromatic spices. This invigorating blend features ginger, cardamom, cinnamon, star anise, cloves, and peppercorn, offering a cosy and uplifting experience. Perfect on its own or with a splash of milk, each cup is a comforting retreat.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: French Earl Grey
disclaimer.description: Indulge in the elegance of our French Earl Grey, a refined blend of classic black tea infused with aromatic bergamot oil, and enriched with delicate rose petals, vibrant calendula petals, and enchanting blue cornflower petals. This floral infusion offers a fragrant and refreshing experience, perfect for elevating your tea time with warmth and luxury in every sip.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: English Breakfast
disclaimer.description: Start your day with the robust and hearty flavour of our English Breakfast tea. This classic blend combines a selection of premium black teas, delivering a strong and invigorating brew. Perfect with or without milk, it provides a satisfying morning experience that prepares you for the day ahead.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: Lemon Lift
disclaimer.description: Revitalise your senses with our Lemon Lift blend, featuring a delightful combination of robust black tea, infused with zesty lemon myrtle, refreshing lemon peel, fragrant lemon verbena, and invigorating lemongrass. This bright and uplifting tea can be enjoyed hot for a cosy experience or brewed as an iced tea for a refreshing afternoon pick-me-up.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: Australian Rainforest and Lemon Myrtle
disclaimer.description: Experience the unique flavours of Australia with our Australian Rainforest and Lemon Myrtle tea, crafted from premium Black Tea grown in the tropical regions of Australia. This blend is infused with the refreshing essence of lemon myrtle, known for its bright, citrus aroma and flavour. Enjoy a comforting cup that captures the essence of the Australian landscape.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: energiser
disclaimer.description: Ignite your day with our energiser blend, featuring premium Sencha Green Tea and aromatic Tulsi. This refreshing tea, rich in antioxidants, supports overall wellness and vitality. With its sweet basil twist, energiser is an ideal choice for a revitalising post-workout beverage, perfect for a refreshing and recharging your body
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.

disclaimer.name: Orange and Ginger
disclaimer.description: Savour a light nd refreshing experience with our Orange and Ginger Green Tea, a blend of premium Sencha Green Tea, vibrant sweet orange peel, warming ginger root, invigorating spearmint, and a hint of licorice root or a delightful aftertaste. This subtly flavoured tea is rich in antioxidants, making an enjoyable chance hot or iced, with a touch of honey for added sweetness.
disclaimer.disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement or wellness regimen.
